title: 3D End Crystal
description: Makes the end crystal 3D when in your hand, but keeps it 2D everywhere else 1.21.4+. No mods required. For versions 1.21-1.21.11
body:
Makes the end crystal 3D when in hand.
For versions:
1.21-1.21.3: Does not have 2D GUI item
1.21.4+: Does have 2D GUI item
![3D end crystal in a players hand, remaining 2d in the hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fd85225b91a14a51fbf77efd1802386035fa427.png)


Oh, and it also makes it 3D on your head, if you want that.

![An end crystal replacing a players head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14391139f21fc977f830767667b1880efe94f993.png)


Feel free to check out my other projects [here](https://modrinth.com/user/Cb2eNE8t), and join the [discord](https://discord.gg/kCNCxHJUGD) and check out my [curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/banana_monkey123/projects)!

_You can use this pack in any modpacks as long as they stay on modrinth or curseforge. You can create content with this pack but anything else please ask me on my [discord](https://discord.gg/kCNCxHJUGD). If you want to share it elsewhere, please do so by providing a link to the modrinth and/or curseforge project page. If I have given you permission for something not stated here, then, if I request you to, you must remove it._
